description: Plant structure and development of seed plants, primarily of flowering plants. Emphasis is placed on structure in relation to function and on the plant body as a structural and functional entity.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Sophomore standing and (ZOOLOGY/​BIOLOGY/​BOTANY  151,BOTANY/​BIOLOGY  130,ZOOLOGY/​BIOLOGY  101, orBIOCORE 381) or graduate/professional standing
